background.title: Built by the Team Behind Hundreds of Millions of Viral Views
background.description: Before building Sigmora, we spent years behind the curtain helping brands generate hundreds of millions of impressions across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. Every insight in our viral database and AI remixer tool comes from real campaign insights — not guesswork.

heading.title: Sigmora Frequently Asked Questions
heading.description: Everything you need to know about scaling your content with Sigmora.

items.a: Sigmora is built for creators, social media managers, growth marketers, and agencies who want to scale their short-form organic content systems.

items.q: Which platforms does the Viral Database cover?
items.a: Sigmora focuses on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts for short-form video research and analysis.

items.q: How does the AI Content Remixer work?
items.a: You upload a video or select a proven reference, then Sigmora analyzes the hook, pacing, and structure to generate a script or scene plan you can adapt.

items.q: Do I need to be a professional creator or marketer?
items.a: No. Sigmora is designed to make strong short-form creative decisions easier for both first-time operators and experienced growth teams.

items.q: What is included in the Enterprise plan?
items.a: Enterprise is for larger teams that need custom credit volume, dedicated support, tailored workflows, and deeper operational flexibility.

heading.title: Sigmora vs. The Competition
heading.description: Stop guessing why videos work. Sigmora provides the quantitative layer that TubeMagic, clipping tools, and traditional AI generators miss.

items.description: Go from initial reference directly to a generated video variant.
Deconstruct why videos hold attention at every second.
Analyze real winning patterns from top performance agencies.
Extracts visual cues, audio energy, and pacing—not just text.
Turn successful benchmarks into usable scripts and scene plans.
Enforce brand standards and workflow patterns across large teams.

footer.title: Ready to build a better content engine?
footer.description: TubeMagic helps you start. Sigmora helps you scale with quantitative precision.
